description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs named ogre-1-8 and ogre-1-9, both running in the default stage. Each job sets the environment variable OGRE_VERSION to its respective version ("1.8" or "1.9") and then executes three shell scripts in order: tools/ci/before-install.sh, tools/ci/install.sh, and tools/ci/build.sh. No custom Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, so the pipeline uses the default runner image and runs on every commit. This setup builds the Ogre library for the specified versions using the provided CI scripts.
